summary: Iteration 239 — R0: Auto-Sync Registro Obblighi Testing Complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Fixed a bug in sync service where cantiere lookup used only 'commessa_id' but cantieri use 'parent_commessa_id'. Auto-sync triggers working correctly with 5-second debounce.
seed_data_creation: Created test commessa and cantiere_sicurezza for testing auto-sync triggers. Cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: R0 Auto-Sync Registro Obblighi fully working. Key features: (1) trigger_sync_obblighi() in obblighi_auto_sync.py with 5-second debounce. (2) Triggers placed in: PUT cantieri-sicurezza (substantive fields: soggetti, dati_cantiere, rischi_confermati, rischi_selezionati, fasi_lavoro), PATCH/GET/POST emissioni endpoints, POST istruttoria rispondi/review, POST commesse-normative crea_ramo/genera_da_istruttoria. (3) Fixed bug: sync service now queries cantiere with $or: [commessa_id, parent_commessa_id]. (4) Non-substantive updates (note_aggiuntive, status) do NOT trigger auto-sync. (5) Debounce prevents spam - two rapid calls within 5 seconds only trigger one sync.

manual_sync.idempotency: PASSED - Second sync creates 0 new (all deduplicated)

debounce.rapid_updates: PASSED - Two updates within 5 seconds only trigger one sync

module_imports.obblighi_auto_sync.py: PASSED - Module imports and executes correctly

route_files_compile.cantieri_sicurezza.py: PASSED - All routes work after trigger additions
route_files_compile.commesse_normative.py: PASSED - All routes work after trigger additions
route_files_compile.istruttoria.py: PASSED - All routes work after trigger additions

backend_resilience.auto_sync_failure: PASSED - Endpoint doesn't crash even if auto-sync fails internally

bug_fixed.description: Sync service cantiere lookup used only 'commessa_id' but cantieri use 'parent_commessa_id'
bug_fixed.fix: Changed _collect_gate_pos and _collect_soggetti to use $or: [commessa_id, parent_commessa_id] query
bug_fixed.impact: Sync now correctly finds cantieri linked via parent_commessa_id

auto_sync_implementation_details.error_handling: Silently logged, never breaks caller's flow
